article_title: Bylaw 14745 — Housing Agreement (6263 abd 6337 Cassie Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Housing Agreement locks 6263–6337 Cassie Avenue as non-market rental in perpetuity
briefs.summary: Burnaby adopted Bylaw 14745 on May 27, 2025, authorising a Housing Agreement with Willingdon Avenue Investments Ltd. that legally binds the non-market rental units at 6263–6337 Cassie Avenue to affordable housing conditions registered on title.
briefs.action_required: Review the Housing Agreement's tenant eligibility, rent, and reporting obligations to ensure ongoing compliance.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14745 — Housing Agreement (6263 abd 6337 Cassie Avenue) Bylaw 2025
